overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban district. The player character descends stairs, traverses covered walkways with dynamic colored lighting, and emerges onto a palm-lined street with moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated transit structure

events.description: descending stairs into lower pedestrian walkway
entering fully covered section with illuminated advertisement screens

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into a covered urban walkway with prominent orange structural elements and neon lighting

entered.detail: large angular orange-yellow structural beams forming stairs and ramps
illuminated billboard displaying Jinguji brand advertisements with purple and red borders
continuous linear white neon light running along the ceiling of the covered walkway
gray concrete pedestrian path with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a descent down orange-painted stairs into a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated structure. The environment features prominent Jinguji brand advertisements on the right wall and continuous overhead neon lighting. The space is sheltered with concrete flooring and metal railings, with sparse pedestrian traffic moving in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transitioning to narrow service alley

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza with benches and trees
entering narrow alley between tall commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza with digital billboards and benches, then turning into a narrow alleyway between buildings

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertisement showing a face with text 'Feeling Kumquatty today?' and beverage can
concrete seating benches arranged along the left side of the plaza
multi-story building with dark green facade and large digital displays
tall vertical digital screen showing fashion advertisements with red background

elements.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious plaza with tiled flooring, benches, and trees. A prominent digital billboard displays an advertisement for a beverage. The camera continues forward, transitioning into a narrow alley between a green commercial building with large red vertical ads on the right and another structure on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping walkway with dynamic colored ceiling panels

events.description: ceiling panels begin cycling through vibrant colors including pink, cyan, and green
crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians walking in same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a long covered walkway with dramatically colored ceiling panels shifting between pink, blue, green, and yellow hues

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: rectangular ceiling panels illuminated with shifting neon colors including magenta, cyan, green, and amber
storefront with green neon sign reading 'BODY IMPLANTS' and red illuminated windows
orange neon signage for 'Fuyutsuki Electronics' above a shop entrance
tall structure with multiple stacked digital screens showing animated advertisements
pink neon sign reading 'EL GUAPO' above a storefront with mannequin displays

elements.scene_description: This segment features an extended walk through a covered commercial walkway distinguished by its striking ceiling panels that cycle through vibrant neon colors. Various storefronts line the right side including a body implants clinic and electronics shop. The crowd density increases as the camera progresses, with pedestrians walking in the same direction through the color-shifting corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with palm trees and vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open street with visible sky and palm trees
blue sports car drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking along a sidewalk next to a busy street lined with palm trees, observing futuristic vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: blue sports car with glowing wheels driving along the street

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
large multi-story building with open parking levels and yellow structural accents
paved road with moving traffic and street lighting
commercial facade with pink neon lighting and digital menu displays

elements.scene_description: The final segment transitions to an open urban street environment with full sky visibility. Tall palm trees line the sidewalk, and a distinctive multi-level parking structure dominates the view across the street. The camera walks along the sidewalk as various futuristic vehicles, including a blue sports car, drive past on the road. Neon-lit storefronts continue along the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a sheltered urban passage into a vibrant, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins with a descent down orange-painted stairs, moving beneath an elevated structure into a covered walkway. As the camera advances, the environment is defined by concrete flooring and metal railings, with the right wall dominated by prominent Jinguji brand advertisements. The scene then flows forward under a canopy of continuous overhead neon lighting, passing sparse pedestrians moving in the opposite direction.
